name: Despot Zombie
short_description: The experimental AI chip in his brain could be humanity's salvation... or it's end. Experience mind-bending combat, explore a dark fantasy wasteland, and unravel a twisted tale as Kurt, humanity's unwilling hope.
detailed_description:
In a world ravaged by a monstrous plague, Kurt stands alone – immune and burdened with an experimental AI chip. Humanity's survival depends on the fragile bond between man and machine. Despot Zombie is a post-apocalyptic third-person shooter where choices matter. Experience intense combat, explore a haunting world, and unravel the secrets within Kurt's mind.

  • Intense, fast-paced combat against monstrous creatures.
  • Explore an atmospheric world steeped in dark fantasy and sci-fi.
  • Decisions impact the game's difficulty and outcome.
  • A blend of TPS, RPG, and horror elements.
